Transcrição Completa: Day 28 - 30 Day Sales Challenge

 

Conversa

 

[00:00]"Day number 28, ladies and gentlemen. Welcome to it. Hopefully you hit your 100 yesterday."

 

[00:05]"Maybe you struggled because now you're having to deliver, build your business, do all this other stuff on top of sales. Jesus, what are you going to do in order to do all that?"

 

[00:15]"Hopefully, you've watched the outsourcing 101 video. You realize that even if you don't have a team, you can't build a team because, you know, you're hitting 100 per day and you're in the 30-day sales challenge."

 

[00:27]"Of course, you need the outsourcing. You need to get the job done."

 

[00:31]"Right now, okay, in my day-to-day, I have four different businesses myself that I have to run, profit with, make sure they're operationally growing, and all stable, right?"

 

[00:42]"On top of that, I just collap— I just literally calculated it today. Again, I have 19 clients."

 

[00:49]"I have a six figure monthly paycheck coming in between the amount of clients we have that's going to continue to grow."

 

[00:56]"I'm going to get that to seven figures coming soon. I'll keep you updated."

 

[01:00]"And in real time, I also have to go out and I love to stay in the game of sales because I love to do the shit that I preach to you. I love to hit a hundred."

 

[01:09]"And the days that I can't hit a hundred are the days I literally have so much more revenue to make because of the positioning that I've gotten to in my business to where 100 sales calls wouldn't make a difference to me."

 

[01:21]"But I know that all my sales people are hitting 100 and I'll push them extra hard that day to hit an extra couple hundred."

 

[01:28]"Hey, sales team, if you're watching this, go hit a 100 more. Come on, let's go."

 

[01:33]"Hey, so check this out. You need to know a few different things once again. So, if you're out hitting your hundred, how are you going to outsource at the same time?"

 

[01:42]"How are you going to do this at the same time? How are you going to do that at the same time? You're not going to be able to."

 

[01:47]"And you need to hire staff. You need to quit being soft. And you need to go out and you need to hire VAs."

 

[01:54]"You need to take a little bit of money. Even if you don't have a lot of money, and you need to outsource, you need to not act like every deal that you get is all profit."

 

[02:03]"You need to give money to your company. You need to have expenses for how you're going to service the deal."

 

[02:09]"You damn well better be delivering and outsourcing. You better not be bitching about the fact that you can't do it because you can go watch outsourcing 101 just in case you didn't hear that the other day."

 

[02:19]"You can go watch the entire phase 7 on how to deliver."

 

[02:23]"Jeremy, I don't know what to sell still. Dude, why are you in the 30-day sales challenge if you didn't go through phase three yet on products and services, right?"

 

[02:31]"Go consume information that you specifically do not know."

 

[02:35]"As you're going to be anybody and everybody watching this specific video, you know damn well, once again, you need to hit your 100."

 

[02:42]"You don't have any excuses there. I'm not making any excuses for you."

 

[02:46]"I'm simply telling you whatever specific piece of data that may be holding you back. Or if you feel efficient, if you feel comfortable, if you feel like you're already a legend, right, and you're already making it, it rain good. Go be a greater legend."

 

[03:01]"You think Michael Jordan stopped going to the gym? You think Kobe stopped going to the gym?"

 

[03:05]"You think anybody in real life that's ever been a professional? You think Tiger Woods put the golf club down?"

 

[03:11]"Maybe to cheat for a little bit and get a DUI or two, but damn well, you know, he picked that golf club back up and he got back on that golf course to swing again and again and again and again and again and again."

 

[03:23]"Because a true professional, a true superstar is never going to put down whatever it is that they practice every single day."

 

[03:30]"Your capacity to continue doing this, your capacity to outsource all of it and duplicate yourself and other people is your capacity to continue growing that revenue and continue building your business so you can focus on more sophisticated problems."

 

[03:44]"I will see you tomorrow. Go hit your 100 and go outsource something."

 

[03:48]"Make sure you get some other people to do the things that you want to do but don't have time to do because you're kind of stuck hitting your hundred because you're in the 30-day sales challenge."

 

 

📊 RESUMO EXECUTIVO

 

NÚMEROS PRINCIPAIS:

Dia 28 do desafio de 30 dias

100 ligações de vendas por dia (meta diária)

4 negócios diferentes gerenciados simultaneamente

19 clientes ativos

6 figuras de faturamento mensal (R$100.000+)

Meta: 7 figuras mensais em breve (R$1.000.000+)

Equipe de vendas fazendo 100+ ligações extras por dia

 

ESTRATÉGIAS E SISTEMAS:

Outsourcing obrigatório: Contratar VAs (Assistentes Virtuais) para escalar operações

Mindset de reinvestimento: Não tratar cada venda como lucro total, reinvestir em operações

Duplicação pessoal: Delegar tarefas para focar em problemas mais sofisticados

Prática constante: Manter-se ativo em vendas mesmo com posicionamento elevado

Gestão de despesas: Ter custos operacionais para entregar serviços com qualidade

 

ESTRUTURA:

Fase 3: Produtos e Serviços

Fase 7: Como Entregar/Delivery

Outsourcing 101: Vídeo de treinamento sobre terceirização

30-Day Sales Challenge: Desafio de fazer 100 ligações diárias por 30 dias

 

DADOS FINANCEIROS:

Faturamento mensal atual: 6 figuras (R$100.000+)

Projeção: 7 figuras mensais (R$1.000.000+)

Modelo: Crescimento através de múltiplos clientes e negócios

Estrutura de custos: Reinvestimento em VAs e operações

 

FILOSOFIA DE CRESCIMENTO:

Comparação com atletas profissionais (Michael Jordan, Kobe Bryant, Tiger Woods)

Prática diária inegociável

Mentalidade anti-desculpas

Foco em escalabilidade através de pessoas

Balanceamento entre vendas, delivery e gestão

 

DURAÇÃO: ~4 minutosFORMATO: Vídeo motivacional/treinamento direto para câmera - Dia 28 do desafio de 30 dias
